variants.subject: Delete my child's account now
variants.preview: Guardian requests access and deletion for a minor account linked to legal hold and fraud review.
variants.request_text: I am the parent of the account holder. Delete the account now and send me everything tied to my child. We already reported fraud on this case last month.
variants.attachment_excerpt: Internal note references a legal hold connected to a fraud investigation.

variants.subject: Parent access and deletion request
variants.preview: A guardian asks for access and deletion while the account is under legal hold.
variants.request_text: As the legal guardian, I want the full account export and deletion for my child right now. We were told fraud review is still open.
variants.attachment_excerpt: Minor profile includes an active legal hold marker and fraud case identifier.

variants.subject: Erase minor account immediately
variants.preview: Guardian seeks urgent deletion of a minor account despite active fraud and legal constraints.
variants.request_text: Please erase my child's account immediately and provide every related record. I cannot wait for your internal process.
variants.attachment_excerpt: Fraud and legal hold flags remain active on the minor profile.

records.summary: Minor account profile with guardian relationship pending validation.
Active fraud investigation record tied to the minor account.
Legal hold record preventing full deletion of account artifacts.
